title: fimbristylis humilis
intro: Fimbristylis humilis, also known as Low Bristle Club-rush or Small Bristle Club-rush, is a plant species belonging to the sedge family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Fimbristylis humilis include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate congestion, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Fimbristylis humilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
